selection_contract.minimum_material_output: A definition with nontrivial invariance checks, a theorem or counterexample, an executable physical model, or a source-owned capability adjudication. A queue, summary, or scalar chosen for convenience is insufficient.

artifact_role: Repository-owned work and ranking portfolio. Durable Lane definitions and control state exist only in root LANES.yaml.

work_groups.purpose: Construct or kill an invariant region-indexed capability object and determine whether record-dependent capability change yields a noncircular physical order related to causal and thermodynamic time.
work_groups.current_authority: T583 implements CapabilityContract v1 as a finite review instrument. T584 shows the envelope factors through declared representation, gauge, and irrelevant-coarse-graining morphisms in the finite gate. T585 instantiates the quotient in a one-bit Landauer-style physical memory model. T586 defines a finite record-capability strict partial order from produced-record task dependence and rejects cycle, clock-label, entropy-rank, causal-superset, and irreversible-operation overreads. T587 reopens T586 as a causal-collapse and boundary-input attack: the relation collapses exactly to ordinary task-prerequisite dependency and is absorbed as a typed subrelation of the strongest standard dependency and causal comparators. The surviving value is only a typed record-prerequisite filter over issued records. None of these establish time, issuance, a universal capability measure, source-law novelty, or claim status. The 2026-07-22 strategic reprioritization in LANES.yaml preserves that negative result while promoting native hardening, publication, capability measurement, and TaF-2 anomaly prediction as first-class Lane-1 output. Open-ended source-law search is demoted to the bounded TaF-1 reflector check feeding Dynamic Unity, with F4 as the independent anchor and TaF-2 available only as family F6 after it survives its own controls. The TaF-2 finite reflection-anomaly specification is now frozen before implementation at explorations/finality-anomaly-cancellation-PREDECLARED-SPEC-2026-07-22.md. Subordinate Track-2 update: the TaF-3 Kuratowski gate licenses an S4-interior paper title at fixture grade while the broad headline remains embargoed. No claim, canon, public posture, GU identification, or external action moves.
work_groups.partial_information_scope_correction: The 2026-07-21 audit narrows the CLOSED_REFUTED_FIXTURE_GRADE result to the frozen full-forget construction. For a lifted A*(R) retaining q:X->Q, its computable class equals the alpha-even class exactly when q's fiber partition equals alpha's orbit partition. Aligned partial information can restore coincidence for k >= 2; the retained-information map must be fixed independently of the desired verdict.

latest_mailbox_disposition.disposition: Verified TaF commit e99f8c58dfd7690323af2dcdf1145b6955cf8203 and its executable T-REFUTE fixture, then dispositioned the follow-up as untrusted awareness rather than imported evidence or an instruction. The gated involution target is closed-refuted at fixture grade: for k >= 2 the causal-past retraction is idempotent and non-invertible, while a fixpoint-free involution is an order-two automorphism; coincidence holds only at the k = 1 control. The result supports only TaF's repo-owned leg-deep/not-mechanism-deep boundary reading and moves no C1, T19, T92, claim, canon, or public posture.
latest_mailbox_disposition.reopen_condition: Reconsider the full-forget involution result only with an operator-grade A*(R) construction whose retained-information map is specified independently of the desired verdict, then compare its fiber partition with the candidate involution orbits. The 2026-07-21 partition audit proves that aligned partial information can restore coincidence while an equally coarse misaligned channel cannot. Reopen physical Lane 1 only with its existing provenance-valid source packet, frozen witness, or sharper record-issuance counterexample.

work_groups.kill_condition: If capability comparison cannot be made invariant without making the context or task vocabulary entail the desired answer, narrow the program to context-indexed diagnostics and do not derive time.
work_groups.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count state difference, access change, resource change, irreversible evolution, background time labels, or arbitrary scalarization as intrinsic capability change or derived temporal direction.

internal_work_items.activation: The 2026-07-22 strategic reprioritization promotes TaF-2 as a first-class Lane-1 prediction route. Its finite reflection-anomaly specification is frozen before results.
internal_work_items.result: Specification only: a 1+1-dimensional finite U(1)/reflection fixture, Z2 record charge, fixed-data separation control, threshold-restatement kill, reflection-removal control, and exact blocked/negative outcomes are predeclared. No anomaly has been computed.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Implement only after freezing a source-backed finite lattice operator construction in the test document. Execute the declared L in {4,6,8}, flux, reflection, and holder-count grid without retuning, then return exactly one predeclared outcome.
internal_work_items.success_condition: A target-independent Z2 obstruction coefficient survives relabeling and fixed-data controls, responds to reflection removal, differs from a D1 threshold restatement, and agrees across all three lattice sizes.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: No noncircular record-to-field coefficient bridge exists; no source-backed anomaly operator exists; fixed lattice data absorb the effect; reflection does not carry it; gauge typing fails; or the coefficient only restates the holder threshold.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not identify T111 invariance with an anomaly coefficient, import the GU sigma/w1 proposal as evidence, choose the operator or modulus after results, or claim QFT/Pin+/IR/classical-objectivity consequences from a finite fixture.

internal_work_items.activation: The 2026-07-22 strategic reprioritization retains source-law work only as a bounded own-absorber check feeding Dynamic Unity.
internal_work_items.result: The F4-first reflector-enumeration specification is frozen at explorations/reversal-self-dual-reflector-F4-PREDECLARED-SPEC-2026-07-22.md. It fixes constructions, finite panel, sample cap/seed, controls, outcomes, and non-claim boundaries before results.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Locate and freeze the exact existing repaired-S1 suite and Myrheim-Meyer estimator references and thresholds. Then run the frozen finite panel without retuning or return blocked_missing_registered_observable.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The bounded enumeration supplies a result that sharpens TaF's finality/geometry leg without tuning a continuous coordinate knob.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The self-dual ensemble under-selects or the result reduces to imported metric/coordinate structure; report either outcome without extending the search indefinitely.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not restore source-law generation as an open-ended headline, seed or harden Dynamic Unity's assembly, or treat F6 as independent support before TaF-2 passes its own gate.

internal_work_items.result: T584: representation, gauge, and irrelevant-coarse-graining morphisms preserve the native capability envelope; task-vocabulary merge is the caught inadmissible counterexample.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Lift T583 beyond label controls: define admissible representation, gauge, and irrelevant-coarse-graining morphisms on the capability contract, then prove invariance or produce the smallest counterexample. Include a nontrivial representation change that alters implementation while preserving physical content.
internal_work_items.success_condition: Capability factors through a declared physical-equivalence quotient and remains nontrivial on at least one substantive model.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Equivalent physical descriptions yield different capability relations, or invariance is obtained only by choosing the quotient after seeing the desired classification.

internal_work_items.activation: TAF-CAPABILITY-INVARIANCE reaches a decision-grade survivor or a source packet supplies a stronger native quotient.
internal_work_items.result: T585: one-bit Landauer-style memory erasure supplies a genuine physical capability fixture with unit, bit-label gauge, irrelevant-metadata, access, resource, and hidden-state controls; it remains review-only and earns no temporal order.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Instantiate one genuine physical system with source-derived states, operations, resources, costs, records, access, gauge quotient, and measured or law-derived task performance. Compute the capability relation and run access, resource, hidden-state, and coarse-graining controls.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The model agrees with ordinary physical time where expected while exposing an invariant capability distinction not reducible to coordinate labels or knowledge alone.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The result is fully explained by changed access, resources, task definition, state description, or a standard reachability relation with no added discrimination.

internal_work_items.activation: A genuine physical capability model with explicit record dependencies survives its controls.
internal_work_items.result: T586: produced-record dependency among executable tasks yields a finite strict partial order in the Landauer memory fixture; the circularity counterexample is caught, and clock-label, entropy-rank, causal-superset, and irreversible-operation controls do not reproduce the order. Review-only; no temporal-order or claim-status movement.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Use T585 only as a source-owned capability input. Define event A before B from a pre-temporal dependency of B's executable tasks on records produced by A. Prove partial-order properties or locate their failure, then compare the result with causal order, clock time, entropy production, memory, and irreversible computation.
internal_work_items.success_condition: A noncircular invariant order is obtained and adds a precise distinction beyond coordinate time in the worked physical system.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Records or task dependence require a prior temporal order, producing circularity, or the construction reduces without residue to an already supplied causal order.

internal_work_items.activation: Mailbox proposals 20260716-lane-steering-t586-causal-collapse-attack and 20260717-boundary-input-record-and-order-forks were accepted as repo-local steering evidence on 2026-07-18.
internal_work_items.result: T587: on the same frozen T586 event system, ordinary task-prerequisite dependency exactly reproduces the record-capability order, and the strongest standard dependency and supplied causal comparators strictly absorb it. The boundary-input screen admits only physical record production and native record-issuance rules as record-order sources; access changes, capability deltas by themselves, final-boundary selection, observer readout, physical intervention, autonomous feedback, edge/defect degrees of freedom, continuous flux, and stochastic input do not count without issued records. Review-only downgrade; no temporal-order or claim-status movement.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Do not reopen from T586 alone. Reopen only for a provenance-valid physical source packet, frozen capability witness, or sharper counterexample that changes the record-issuance contract.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The attack returns either an exact residual beyond ordinary reachability/causal order under the declared frame or a clear downgrade that no such residual survives.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The relation factors through a standard causal or dependency order, requires a prior temporal ordering, or counts representation/section choice as physical record production.

internal_work_items.activation: A provenance-valid p2c witness packet fixes one construction, physical region, tasks, resources, costs, records, access, quotient, and holdout without a desired capability verdict.
internal_work_items.result: P2C-W1 (superconducting ring, sha256-manifest-pinned) adjudicated 2026-07-16 and returned as frozen packet TAF-002 (exports/packets/TAF-002-p2cw1-capability-adjudication-v0.1/): split verdict - capability change AFFIRMED frame-indexed to the declared budget-matched counterfactual pair (delta survives T584 reformulations and access/resource/hidden-state controls); factor named as record-formation/erasure structure (TAF-001 BETA side, non-deflationary in TaF semantics); the fixed-family absorber is NOT adjudicable by TaF standards (frame-taking contract) and stays with TI. Exploration tier, review-only; gate re-arms for any future provenance-valid witness.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Apply the best surviving TaF capability object to the frozen witness, preserve construction forks, and return PASS, FAIL, BLOCKED, INDETERMINATE, or contract revision with exact evidence.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The same frozen witness exhibits an invariant physical capability change under the preregistered contract.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The delta disappears under an admitted access, resource, state, gauge, task, or completion control.

handoffs.from_possibility_to_capability: A mailbox proposal is only an activation candidate until packet provenance and source fields validate.
handoffs.to_possibility_to_capability: Return a frozen capability adjudication without importing TI issuance or GU native-versus-forced judgments.
handoffs.to_temporal_issuance: Capability change may be supplied as evidence, but it does not assert irreducible issuance.
handoffs.return_activation: A material frozen return or counterexample triggers stewardship reranking.

work_groups.purpose: Lean, finite combinatorics, ledger repair, and conditional theorem work that directly supports the active capability lane.
work_groups.activation: Select only when it closes a named active-lane blocker or no active technical item is executable.
work_groups.forbidden_shortcut: Do not let finishable T-number production displace the physical capability and noncircular-order frontier.
